Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 15}Pressing {f 1 3 108} during battle will let you {f 0 1 2}Rush{f 0 1 27} through combat. Every party member will attack automatically and continuously.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}This allows the battle to proceed at high speed without any player input. To stop Rushing, press {f 1 3 999}.[n]{f 1 1}
